response.justification: Bogdan has broad engineering experience across languages and domains, with notable open-source contributions and deep systems thinking, but lacks explicit, recent, or demonstrable expertise in JVM tooling, Spring, or enterprise IDE development — key requirements for this role. His Java exposure appears limited and outdated, with no clear evidence of work on IDE internals, build tool integration, or JVM-based enterprise frameworks.
strengths: Strong full-stack and systems-level engineering background across multiple languages and platforms.
Active open-source contributor with tools demonstrating deep understanding of developer workflows and tooling.
Proven ability to lead, teach, and document complex technical concepts through workshops and public projects.
concerns: No recent or prominent Java/Kotlin IDE or JVM tooling experience shown in resume.
Enterprise frameworks like Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate are not mentioned despite being core to the role.
Java skills appear outdated (last listed role was 2018) and not aligned with current enterprise tooling demands.
